query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name IN ('Albany Family Doctors', 'Aspley Firstcare Doctors', 'Ausdocs Carindale Pty Ltd', 'Kawana Family Clinic', 'Mount Cotton Medical Centre', 'Stafford Heights Medical Practice')
  AND s.serviceType IN ('Internet', 'NBN', 'Broadband')
ORDER BY c.name;
